ops.text:
FINAL CALIBRATION (c3, pre-registered 2-run K=3 protocol, opus/large, 180 votes) — SHIP GATE NOT MET.

| run | k_TP/15 | k_FP/15 | TPR | FPR | J | Newcombe J CI95 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| A | 5 | 2 | 0.333 | 0.133 | 0.200 | [-0.105, +0.467] |
| B | 4 | 4 | 0.267 | 0.267 | 0.000 | [-0.298, +0.298] |
| pooled 2-pass | 9/30 | 6/30 | 0.300 | 0.200 | 0.100 | [-0.119, +0.307] |

Test-retest (30 per-row K=3 majority labels, run A vs run B): raw agreement 0.90, Cohen kappa 0.734, 3 flips (rows 7, 8, 13). Gate: J>=0.3 both runs FAIL (0.20 / 0.00); TPR>FPR both runs FAIL (run B equal); kappa>=0.29 PASS (0.734 vs pairwise-v1 0.0 and pointwise 0.294 references). gate_met=false. Artifacts: E45-panel-v2/out/{votes_runA,votes_runB,calibration_v2}.json. Spend: ~0.72M input tok opus across probes+diagnostic+2 runs, est ~$5 of $10 cap.

FINDINGS — the residual defect is a signal ceiling in the packet windows, not prompt asymmetry: (1) run A's 5 TPs are exactly the E17-pointwise-separable rows (7,15,16,18,21); the other 10 warranted rows are UNANIMOUS 3-0 losses under c3 and were silent under every framing tried — the render-v2 tail alone does not carry what made those moments steer-worthy, so judge TPR plateaus ~0.33 regardless of prompt; (2) pushing the threshold (c2) buys recall only at FPR ~0.67 — flat ROC; (3) negatives 6 and 20 attract unanimous concrete-sounding objections (FPR floor ~0.13), with run-level FP churn adding rows 8/13 in run B. c3 strictly dominates the deployed v1 on every measured axis (J 0.10-0.20 vs 0.00; kappa 0.73 vs 0.00; non-constant decider) but cannot reach J>=0.3 per-run: even at FPR=0 the TPR ceiling (~0.27-0.33 binomial) straddles the bar. Consistent with the E17-rep sizing memo: n=15/stratum + window-limited signal, and the labels.json blind-label session (task cc17e0c) remains the real unblocking step — a human labeling from the same windows may also fail to recover the design-intent strata, which would re-scope the defect from "judge" to "packet". Fix stays UNSHIPPED per pre-registration (workspace cc-steer-we holds candidate c3 + K=3 tests, gates green: pytest 975 passed, Linux ty clean); task d5cfd966 stays open — orchestrator decides among: ship-as-reliability-improvement vs hold-for-human-labels vs window-enrichment.
